OFF_LABEL_INFORMATION: The Coche family is an old family of winemakers in Meursault for several generations. Our estate, founded in the 1940s by Julien Coche-Depord, was taken over by Alain Coche-Bizouard, his son. It is now run by Fabien Coche, who manages 12 hectares spread across Meursault, Auxey-Duresses, Monthelie, Pommard, and Saint Roman. In 2003, a small grape purchasing activity was established in Saint-Romain, Puligny-Montrachet, Saint-Aubin, and Chassagne-Montrachet, in order to expand our range. To date, we vinify 27 appellations, 20 in white and 7 in red. Our wines are vinified without additives, no fining, no filtration, only a small amount of sulfur in liquid form is added during vinification.
